message:
test(search-core): add 65 tests for query, tantivy_schema, fusion, and index_layout

- query.rs: 20 new tests (trait coverage, serde edges, invalid deserialize, builder coverage)
- tantivy_schema.rs: 8 new tests (field ID uniqueness, subject search, empty index, multi-doc)
- fusion.rs: 14 new tests (trait coverage, constants, tiebreaker paths, large candidate set)
- index_layout.rs: 13 new tests (trait coverage, idempotent dirs, symlink replacement, scope edges)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
